default.description: Foundational typography setting used extensively across the entire design system.

mono.description: Used mainly for numbers and any text that need consistent spacing.

global.description: Handle text display across multiple languages, accommodating character sets that require special typographic considerations.

small.description: Subtext Small (10px) - Smallest size for auxiliary text; use for disclaimers or fine print.

medium.description: Subtext Medium (12px) - Default size for secondary information, useful for mid-size subtexts.

large.description: Subtext Large (14px) - Larger subtext for emphasis without becoming main content.

small.description: Body Small (16px) - Compact size for body text; maximizes space in tight layouts.

medium.description: Body Medium (18px) - Standard body text size for balanced readability.

large.description: Body Large (20px) - Enhanced size for body text when emphasis or easier reading is needed.

small.description: Heading Small (24px) - Smaller heading size for subsections or secondary titles.

medium.description: Heading Medium (28px) - Standard size for main section headings.

large.description: Heading Large (32px) - Large headings for section starts or major transitions.

small.description: Title Small (40px) - Smaller titles for less dominant page elements.

medium.description: Title Medium (48px) - Standard title size for main content areas.

large.description: Title Large (56px) - Largest title size for key focal points or primary headings.

small.description: Use small line-height for compact layouts such table cells or captions.

medium.description: Use medium line-height for standard layouts for a more balance visual hierachy and legibility.

large.description: Use large line-height for spacious layouts, ideal for long-form content, headlines, or text elements that could benefit from increased vertical spacing.

small.description: Use small line-height for compact layouts such table cells or captions.

medium.description: Use medium line-height for standard layouts for a more balance visual hierachy and legibility.

large.description: Use large line-height for spacious layouts, ideal for long-form content, headlines, or text elements that could benefit from increased vertical spacing.

small.description: Use small line-height for compact layouts such table cells or captions.

medium.description: Use medium line-height for standard layouts for a more balance visual hierachy and legibility.

large.description: Use large line-height for spacious layouts, ideal for long-form content, headlines, or text elements that could benefit from increased vertical spacing.

small.description: Use small line-height for compact layouts such table cells or captions.

medium.description: Use medium line-height for standard layouts for a more balance visual hierachy and legibility.

large.description: Use large line-height for spacious layouts, ideal for long-form content, headlines, or text elements that could benefit from increased vertical spacing.

light.description: Set the type to light weight ideal for less dominant appearance.

normal.description: Set the type to a normal weight ideal for a general appearance.

medium.description: Set the type to a medium weight ideal for a more moderate appearance.

bold.description: Set the type to a bold weight ideal for headings, emphasis, buttons and anything text that need attention.
